data.title: WLFI Advisor shorted TRUMP 10x on Hyperliquid, with a liquidation price of $12.49
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LookonChain monitoring, WLFI consultant @cryptogle deposited $1 million USDC to Hyperliquid 5 hours ago and shorted TRUMP with 10x leverage. The liquidation price was $12.49.

data.title: Musk Agrees with Ackman's Call for Reconciliation with Trump
data.description: According to Odaily, DogeDesigner (@cb_doge) posted on the X platform that Elon Musk has responded to Bill Ackman, expressing agreement that he and U.S. President Donald Trump should 'reconcile' for the sake of national interest. Previously, Musk had replied to Ackman's tweet suggesting that cooperation between Musk and Trump would be mutually beneficial, stating that Ackman was correct.

data.title: Momentum Completes Strategic Financing Led by OKX Ventures
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Sui Ecosystem DEX Momentum has completed a new round of strategic financing, with a valuation of US$100 million, led by OKX Ventures, followed by Coinbase Ventures, its strategic partners Protagonist and DNA Fund, Gate Ventures, MEXC Ventures, and KuCoin Ventures. This round of financing will be used for Momentum's growth in the Sui DeFi ecosystem. 
At present, the Swap transaction volume on Momentum has reached US$3 billion, the TVL has reached US$69 million, and the number of users has exceeded 420,000 in two months. 
Previously, Momentum had completed a round of US$10 million financing in March 2025, led by Varys Capital.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with TRX Leading Gains
data.description: According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market experienced varied movements on June 6, with TRX leading the gains. TRX is currently priced at $0.277, marking a 1.19% increase within the day. On the other hand, several tokens faced significant declines. PEOPLE is priced at $0.0191, showing a 9.73% decrease. LDO stands at $0.763, down by 9.57%. DOGE is valued at $0.171, experiencing a 9.27% drop. ORDI is priced at $7.956, with a 9.14% decrease, and OM is at $0.283, down by 8.99%. These fluctuations highlight the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin slides below $102K as crypto market faces sharp selloff amid global uncertainty
data.description:
6-6-2025 – A tempest of selling battered cryptocurrency markets on June 5, with Bitcoin (BTC) plummeting to a low of $101,500, its steepest drop in over a month. The world’s pre-eminent digital currency, which later steadied around $102,000, has shed more than 8% since its recent zenith of nearly $112,000, raising fears of further declines [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bitcoin-slides-below-102k-as-crypto-market-faces-sharp-selloff-amid-global-uncertainty/

data.title: Pump.fun calls out to Musk, supports his coin to compete with Meme coin TRUMP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Pump.fun posted a message on the X platform to Elon Musk: "Musk, I'm sorry to hear that you have a conflict with Trump. Although we can't provide advice, we can provide a solution: Trump has issued tokens, which means you have the opportunity to do the most interesting thing in history. This is the only time we support PVP, and now is the time."

data.title: Musk and Trump may have temporarily reconciled
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DogeDesigner (@cb_doge) posted on the X platform: "Musk responded to Bill Ackman and agreed that he and President Trump should 'reconcile' and put national interests first." Previously, Musk responded to Bill Ackman's tweet that "Musk and Trump will benefit if they work together, but will suffer if they separate," saying that he was right.

data.title: The U.S. SEC will hold a DeFi roundtable meeting next Monday, and the U.S. House of Representatives will hold a hearing on the crypto market structure bill on Tuesday.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform that next week will be a critical week for crypto policies. On Monday, the SEC will host a DeFi roundtable, and on Tuesday, the House of Representatives will hold a nomination hearing on the Crypto Market Structure Act (CLARITY Act).

data.title: Cardano News: What Franklin Templeton Operating Nodes Means For ADA Price
data.description:
Franklin Templeton, with assets worth $1. 6 trillion, actively runs Cardano nodes as institutional demand for altcoins picks up. The latest Cardano news positions ADA for prospective price activity as the blockchain network secures corporate support
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/05/cardano-news-what-franklin-templeton-operating-nodes-means-for-ada-price/

data.title: Planet Morning News
Key Week Ahead for Cryptocurrency Policy Developments
data.description: According to BlockBeats, next week is set to be pivotal for cryptocurrency policy. On Monday, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) will host a roundtable discussion on decentralized finance (DeFi). Following this, on Tuesday, the House of Representatives will hold a nomination hearing concerning the CLARITY Act, which addresses the structure of the crypto market.

data.title: OKX Ventures announces investment in Sui ecosystem’s leading DEX Momentum
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Ventures announced the completion of a strategic investment in Momentum. Momentum is the DEX in the Sui ecosystem, with a minimalist interactive experience and deep liquidity characteristics. With the trend of traditional institutions accelerating their entry and the prospect of the RWA market gradually expanding, Momentum has become an important DeFi infrastructure in the ecosystem. Since its establishment in 2022, Momentum has continuously refined its product mechanism and achieved near-instant transaction confirmation. In 2 months, it has obtained 42,000 active wallets, the total value locked (TVL) on the chain exceeded $70 million, and the transaction volume reached $3 billion, of which more than 25% of the DEX transaction volume of the Sui network comes from Momentum. Compared with the traditional AMM decentralized platform, the performance is improved by more than 10x, and it can maintain good scalability and stability in a high-concurrency environment.
Benson, partner of OKX Ventures, said: "As the leading DeFi application of the Sui ecosystem, Momentum uses the ve (3,3) mechanism to allow traders, retail investors, and institutional users who pursue low slippage and high liquidity to obtain a better on-chain trading experience, which will drive the Sui public chain DeFi ecosystem to enter the next growth cycle and prosperity faster." (Chainwire)

According to Yonhap News, these [. .

data.title: Hyperliquid 25 times long ETH whale closed its position and made a profit of $5.19 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale closed a 25-fold long position in ETH, making a total profit of $5.19 million and withdrawing all funds from HyperLiquid. Previously, the whale deposited $4.3 million in Hyperliquid, and the value of the ETH long position once exceeded $75 million.

data.title: U.S. House Speaker supports Musk, calls him a friend
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Johnson, Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives: Musk is a friend. I sent him a lot of messages via text message. I hope he can read it. (Jinshi)

data.title: Yuga Labs CEO plans to dissolve ApeCoin DAO, saying it is a waste of resources
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Recently, Yuga Labs CEO Greg Solano proposed a plan to dissolve ApeCoin DAO and transfer its assets and responsibilities to ApeCo, a new entity created by Yuga Labs. Solano criticized that ApeCoin DAO "has evolved from a promise to a slow, noisy and unserious governance performance" and that resources were wasted on "vanity proposals and low-impact plans." The new entity will focus on supporting high-quality projects and strengthening the three core pillars of ApeChain, Bored Ape Yacht Club and Otherside. If the proposal is passed, ApeCoin holders will lose all governance rights. This move is part of Yuga Labs' strategic reorganization. The company has recently sold NFT project IPs such as Moonbirds and CryptoPunks to refocus on its core business. (Decrypt)

data.title: Tesla's stock price fell by more than $19.5 billion due to its falling out with Trump
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Due to the fallout between Musk and Trump, Tesla's stock price fell by more than 14%, and its market value shrunk by $153 billion, creating the largest single-day drop in history. Musk holds about 12.8% of Tesla's shares. As a result, the market value of these shares has shrunk by more than $19.5 billion.
According to Yahoo Finance data, Tesla's stock price after hours is now $286.99, a slight rebound.
